docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-24-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, BOB $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,565.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, BOB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-04-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-17-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, BOB
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, BOB

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-04-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUN-24-2015 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-24-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-24-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN--VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE JEAN MILEFF. FILED BY AUTORETURN
